raw_consumer_statement:
On XX/XX/23 I applied for a Macy 's credit card to take advantage of a store sale. I paid the entire amount of the purchase using another credit card. 

XXXX Citi Bank purchased the account. 

On XX/XX/23 I received a letter from Citi Bank claiming that my account was past due. 

I called my local Macy 's and was able to determine that I owed {$64.00} of which {$30.00} was past due. 

These charges were not authorized by me. 

I spoke with the XXXX XXXX and was told, over the phone, that due to the dispute my account now had a XXXX balance. I was not allowed to close my account.
